title: French Kale Chowder
description: A hearty French-inspired kale chowder that combines the creaminess of silky potatoes with the earthiness of kale.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped kale and cook until wilted, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced Irish potatoes, chowder, and 4 cups of water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season the soup with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the chowder hot, garnished with chopped kale if desired.
